scripts.sanity:build-studio: cd sanity && sanity build dist -y && rm -rf ../public/studio && mkdir -p ../public/studio && cp -r dist/. ../public/studio/ && cd ../public/studio && find . -type f \( -name '*.html' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.webmanifest' \) -exec sed -i 's|"/static/|"/studio/static/|g; s|"/vendor/|"/studio/vendor/|g' {} +
scripts.build:full: npm run sanity:sync && npm run sanity:build-studio && next build
